top_signals.title: A Fresh Look at the Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping
top_signals.summary:
In 2024, Allison Minor wrote, “Solving the Houthi Threat to Freedom of Navigation,” where she argued the international response to Houthi attacks on shipping in the Red Sea has so far been inadequate and proposed a U.N.-led solution. Two years later, with global attention once again focused on maritime shipping activity, we asked Allison to review her arguments. Image: Petty Officer 1st Class Jonathan Word via DVIDSWhen you wrote about the Houthi threat in 2024, the activities in the Red Sea commanded high global attention. Two years on, that attention has largely shifted to the Strait of Hormuz. What has been

The post A Fresh Look at the Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Disney Exiting Streaming Could Spur 40% Rally, Wells Fargo Says
top_signals.summary: Walt Disney Co. shares have been in a slump for years, but Wells Fargo Securities said there’s one possible move that could reverse the trend: ditching its streaming-video business.

top_signals.title: Kenya Eyes $500 Million Eurobond Buyback to Ease Debt Pressure
top_signals.summary: Kenya is considering buying back as much as $500 million of its eurobonds to extend maturities and ease repayment pressures, according to people familiar with the plans.

top_signals.title: VW CEO Outlines Up to 50,000 More Job Cuts to Hit Savings Goals
top_signals.summary: Volkswagen AG Chief Executive Officer Oliver Blume outlined a plan to eliminate as many as 50,000 more jobs globally as he attempts a far-reaching overhaul to reduce costs at Europe’s biggest carmaker.

top_signals.title: France Cuts 6.4 GW of Nuclear Power as Heatwave Grips the Country
top_signals.summary: France’s nuclear power generation was slashed by 6.4 gigawatts (GW) on Monday amid a prolonged and intense heatwave that hiked river temperatures and limited the ability of the power plants to use the water to cool reactors. As many as eight reactors in France, which is Europe’s leader in nuclear power generation, were forced to curtail power output, according to data from the plants’ operator EDF and grid operator RTE cited by Reuters. The 6.4 GW of curtailed power output was equivalent to 14% of France’s overall power…

top_signals.title: Robinhood Chain draws over $3 billion in weekly DEX volume to join top five chains: Bernstein
top_signals.summary: Robinhood Chain hit $3.1B in weekly DEX volume and 65K users since its July 1 launch, as the Layer 2 eyes tokenized markets, Bernstein said.
